body.title: Boredom module — add lock around _traversal_log; document three-concept confusion
body.result: Shipped in b0059caf. threading.Lock wraps append+prune+read+reset on _traversal_log. Docstring names the three distinct boredoms (retrieval penalty, arousal-flat detector, idle habit) to prevent future merge-confusion. 3 concurrency tests + 15 existing boredom tests pass.
body.description:
Pass-2 Area 4 P1-4.1 (SHIP). cognition/boredom.py::_traversal_log is mutated without a lock. Latent (main-loop-only today) but race opens the moment pe_chain or any background source calls record_traversal. Also documented: three distinct 'boredom' concepts in Igor are easy to confuse — cognition/boredom.py (retrieval-score penalty), push_sources.BoredomSource (arousal-flat detector), tools/boredom_idle.py (idle-traversal habit). Do not merge; note which-is-which in the docstring.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/boredom.py (add threading.Lock around _traversal_log; update docstring to name the three concepts), tests/test_boredom_concurrency.py (new).
**Design rules:** docs-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** IN — threading.Lock + docstring + concurrency tests. OUT — merging the three boredoms; changing enable gate; altering penalty semantics.
**Test plan:** three threads hammering record_traversal simultaneously; concurrent read during write; reset mid-read. No crashes, all snapshots in valid [0.0, 1.0] range.
